recurring_cluster_across_three_unrelated.evidence: The init, ideation, and planning runs all belong to the same Amux product task; they are not unrelated task evidence.

distinct_triggers_and_adjacent_boundary.observed: Distinct terminal-native triggers are defined, but the deterministic boundary scan found zero existing specialists at or above the 0.35 adjacency threshold.
distinct_triggers_and_adjacent_boundary.required: Distinct triggers plus at least one evidenced adjacent specialist needing a DO NOT TRIGGER clause.

context_isolation_payoff.observed: The agent and four proposed skill bodies contain 1,897 domain-specific words, approximately more than 2,000 tokens, before loading the approved spec and research report.
context_isolation_payoff.required: At least approximately 2,000 tokens of domain-specific context per task.

three_reflections_or_team_gap_records.evidence: No .guild/reflections entry or approved .guild/team gap record names terminal-ui.
